// note: Compiles the leg lab + harness (src/*.ts) to dist/*.js with tsgo (serve.py runs `tsgo -p` on this). `@axiom/game` resolves to the SDK's built declarations for typecheck; the emitted JS keeps the bare specifier, resolved in the browser by the import map in index.html. The shared axiom-game-runtime wasm + the SDK boot edge resolve by absolute path, served by serve.py. Paths are relative to this file: five levels up is the repo root (leg_lab -> soccer_penalty -> src -> axiom-gallery -> apps -> root).
